title: OpenChronology Bundle Manifest Schema
description: Schema for manifest.json — the required entry point descriptor inside every .chronpkg bundle. A .chronpkg is a ZIP archive of .chron event files, bundled .chroncal and .chronverse definitions, a /assets directory, and this manifest. The manifest provides a lightweight index of all contained events and a stable entry point for parsers.
x-openchronology-note: This schema validates the manifest.json file inside the archive, not the .chronpkg ZIP envelope itself.

schema_version.description: Must be '0.2'. Parsers use this to select the correct parsing rules.

title.description: Human-readable name of this bundle (e.g. 'The Fellowship of the Ring — Timeline').

description.description: Summary of the bundle's content and scope.

version.description: Semver string for this bundle release (e.g. '1.0.0').

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this bundle was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this bundle was last updated.

license.description: License identifier for the bundle's content (e.g. 'CC-BY-4.0').

canonical_url.description: Authoritative hosted URL for this bundle, if published.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for validation. Should point to this schema.

entry_point.description: Relative path to the primary .chron file within the bundle. Defaults to the first entry in events[] when absent.

events.description: Lightweight index of all .chron files in the package. Every .chron file in the events/ directory MUST have an entry here.

calendars.description: Index of bundled .chroncal files in the calendars/ directory.

universes.description: Index of bundled .chronverse files in the universes/ directory.

base_path.description: Base directory for bundled asset files. Defaults to 'assets/'. All chronpkg:// URLs resolve relative to this directory.

total_size_bytes.description: Advisory total size of all bundled assets in bytes.

event_entry.description: Index entry for a single .chron file in the bundle.

path.description: Relative path to the .chron file from the archive root (e.g. 'events/council-of-elrond.chron').

id.description: UUID-v4 matching the event.id in the referenced .chron file. Used for deduplication and cross-referencing.

title.description: Projected from event.content.title. Enables quick scanning without parsing each .chron file.

type.description: Optional projection of event.type for quick filtering.

start_value.description: Optional projection of temporal.start_value for quick sorting.

definition_entry.description: Index entry for a bundled .chroncal or .chronverse file.

path.description: Relative path to the definition file from the archive root (e.g. 'calendars/shire-reckoning.chroncal').

canonical_url.description: The authoritative hosted URL for this definition. Preserved so parsers can check for updates after unbundling.

bundled_version.description: Semver string of the definition version included in this bundle.
